data.name: ContentIdeasDescription
data.value: Plan your own content based on what you learn. Link ideas to source resources and track them from concept to published.

data.name: LearnAndTakeNotesDescription
data.value: Work through your queue at your own pace. Capture insights, questions, and key takeaways as you learn.

data.name: DeleteCollectionDialogMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this shared collection? The share link will stop working.

data.name: SharedCollectionsSubtitle
data.value: Create and manage shareable groups of resources

data.name: NotFoundDescription
data.value: Sorry, the content you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

data.name: GetOrganizedMinutes
data.value: Get organized in minutes, not hours.

data.name: PageNotFoundDescription
data.value: Sorry, the page you are looking for does not exist.

data.name: NoContentIdeasDescription
data.value: Start planning your content creation journey

data.name: SearchResourcesPlaceholder
data.value: Search resources by title, description, notes, or tags...

data.name: FeaturesTitle
data.value: Everything You Need to Learn Efficiently

data.name: HeroDescription
data.value: Stop drowning in browser tabs. LearnStack helps you organize, prioritize, and track your AI learning resources - from blog posts and podcasts to videos and courses. Fast learning with shared learning links. All in one place.

data.name: SmartOrganizationDescription
data.value: Filter by content type, status, or priority. Use tags and search to find anything instantly. Drag and drop to reorder.

data.name: ErrorSubtitle
data.value: An error occurred while processing your request.

data.name: HeroTitle
data.value: Master AI One Resource at a Time

data.name: ResourceLibraryDescription
data.value: Save and organize blog posts, videos, podcasts, courses, and documentation. Auto-fetch metadata from URLs for quick setup.

data.name: SharedCollectionMissingDescription
data.value: This shared collection doesn't exist or has been deactivated.

data.name: NoSharedCollectionsDescription
data.value: Create a collection to share your curated resources with others.

data.name: NoResourcesInCollection
data.value: This collection has no resources yet.

data.name: NoResourcesToLearnDescription
data.value: Select a resource from All Resources to start learning

data.name: ProgressTrackingDescription
data.value: Track your learning status - To Learn, In Progress, or Completed. See your progress at a glance with visual statistics.

data.name: CreateContentDescription
data.value: Turn your knowledge into content. Link your ideas to what you've learned and share with the world.

data.name: TestimonialsSubtitle
data.value: See what others are saying about LearnStack.

data.name: NoCreditCardFreeForever
data.value: No credit card required • Free forever for individuals

data.name: MultipleViewsDescription
data.value: Switch between card view and data grid. Customize your workspace to match how you like to work.

data.name: FeaturesSubtitle
data.value: Designed for developers, researchers, and AI enthusiasts who want to stay on top of their learning.

data.name: JoinThousandsLearners
data.value: Join thousands of learners who use LearnStack to master AI, one resource at a time.

data.name: RichNoteTakingDescription
data.value: Capture key learnings, important quotes, and follow-up questions. Your notes are searchable and always accessible.

data.name: TrackOrganizeLearningMaterials
data.value: Track and organize your learning materials

data.name: SaveResourcesDescription
data.value: Paste a URL and LearnStack automatically fetches the title, description, and thumbnail. Add tags and set priority.

data.name: You do not have access to this resource.
data.value: You do not have access to this resource.

data.name: Thank you for confirming your email.
data.value: Thank you for confirming your email.

data.name: Error: Invalid email change confirmation link.
data.value: Error: Invalid email change confirmation link.

data.name: Unable to find user with Id '{0}'
data.value: Unable to find user with Id '{0}'

data.name: Thank you for confirming your email change.
data.value: Thank you for confirming your email change.

data.name: Please enter an email address for this site below and click the Register button to finish
data.value: Please enter an email address for this site below and click the Register button to finish

data.name: Error loading external login information during confirmation.
data.value: Error loading external login information during confirmation.

data.name: Enter your email to reset it.
data.value: Enter your email to reset it.

data.name: Please check your email to reset your password.
data.value: Please check your email to reset your password.

data.name: The password reset link is invalid or has expired.
data.value: The password reset link is invalid or has expired.

data.name: This account has been locked out due to multiple failed login attempts. Please try again later.
data.value: This account has been locked out due to multiple failed login attempts. Please try again later.

data.name: Don't have an account? Register here
data.value: Don't have an account? Register here

data.name: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
data.value: Invalid email or password. Please try again.

data.name: Your login is protected with an authenticator app. Enter your authenticator code below.
data.value: Your login is protected with an authenticator app. Enter your authenticator code below.

data.name: Don't have access to your authenticator device? You can
data.value: Don't have access to your authenticator device? You can

data.name: log in with a recovery code
data.value: log in with a recovery code

data.name: You have requested to log in with a recovery code. This login will not be remembered until you provide
data.value: You have requested to log in with a recovery code. This login will not be remembered until you provide

data.name: an authenticator app code at log in or disable 2FA and log in again.
data.value: an authenticator app code at log in or disable 2FA and log in again.

data.name: Already have an account? Sign in here
data.value: Already have an account? Sign in here

data.name: This app does not currently have a real email sender registered, see
data.value: This app does not currently have a real email sender registered, see

data.name: for how to configure a real email sender.
data.value: for how to configure a real email sender.

data.name: Click here to confirm your account
data.value: Click here to confirm your account

data.name: Please check your email to confirm your account.
data.value: Please check your email to confirm your account.

data.name: Error finding user for unspecified email
data.value: Error finding user for unspecified email

data.name: Enter your email to receive a new link.
data.value: Enter your email to receive a new link.

data.name: Verification email sent. Please check your email.
data.value: Verification email sent. Please check your email.

data.name: Create a new password for your account.
data.value: Create a new password for your account.

data.name: Your password has been successfully reset.
data.value: Your password has been successfully reset.

data.name: There are no external authentication services configured.
data.value: There are no external authentication services configured.

data.name: Manage your account preferences and security.
data.value: Manage your account preferences and security.

data.name: Put these codes in a safe place.
data.value: Put these codes in a safe place.

data.name: If you lose your device and don't have the recovery codes you will lose access to your account.
data.value: If you lose your device and don't have the recovery codes you will lose access to your account.

data.name: Update your email address and verification status.
data.value: Update your email address and verification status.

data.name: Confirmation link to change email sent. Please check your email.
data.value: Confirmation link to change email sent. Please check your email.

data.name: Manage your linked external login providers.
data.value: Manage your linked external login providers.

data.name: Remove this {0} login from your account
data.value: Remove this {0} login from your account

data.name: No external login providers are available.
data.value: No external login providers are available.

data.name: Error: The external login was not removed.
data.value: Error: The external login was not removed.

data.name: Error: Could not load external login info.
data.value: Error: Could not load external login info.

data.name: Error: The external login was not added. External logins can only be associated with one account.
data.value: Error: The external login was not added. External logins can only be associated with one account.

data.name: Error: Failed to set phone number.
data.value: Error: Failed to set phone number.

data.name: Manage your passkeys for passwordless sign-in.
data.value: Manage your passkeys for passwordless sign-in.

data.name: Remove this passkey from your account
data.value: Remove this passkey from your account

data.name: You have reached the maximum number of allowed passkeys. Please delete one before adding a new one.
data.value: You have reached the maximum number of allowed passkeys. Please delete one before adding a new one.

data.name: Error: The browser did not provide a passkey.
data.value: Error: The browser did not provide a passkey.

data.name: Error: You have reached the maximum number of allowed passkeys.
data.value: Error: You have reached the maximum number of allowed passkeys.

data.name: Error: Could not add the passkey: {0}
data.value: Error: Could not add the passkey: {0}

data.name: Error: The passkey could not be added to your account.
data.value: Error: The passkey could not be added to your account.

data.name: Error: The specified passkey ID had an invalid format.
data.value: Error: The specified passkey ID had an invalid format.

data.name: Error: The passkey could not be deleted.
data.value: Error: The passkey could not be deleted.

data.name: Add a local password so you can log in without an external login.
data.value: Add a local password so you can log in without an external login.

data.name: You do not have a local username/password for this site. Add a local account so you can log in without an external login.
data.value: You do not have a local username/password for this site. Add a local account so you can log in without an external login.

data.name: Add an extra layer of security to your account.
data.value: Add an extra layer of security to your account.

data.name: You have no recovery codes left.
data.value: You have no recovery codes left.

data.name: generate a new set of recovery codes
data.value: generate a new set of recovery codes

data.name: before you can log in with a recovery code.
data.value: before you can log in with a recovery code.

data.name: Privacy and cookie policy have not been accepted.
data.value: Privacy and cookie policy have not been accepted.

data.name: You must accept the policy before you can enable two factor authentication.
data.value: You must accept the policy before you can enable two factor authentication.

data.name: The current browser has been forgotten. When you login again from this browser you will be prompted for your 2fa code.
data.value: The current browser has been forgotten. When you login again from this browser you will be prompted for your 2fa code.

data.name: Permanently remove your account and all associated data.
data.value: Permanently remove your account and all associated data.

data.name: Deleting this data will permanently remove your account, and this cannot be recovered.
data.value: Deleting this data will permanently remove your account, and this cannot be recovered.

data.name: Delete data and close my account
data.value: Delete data and close my account

data.name: Remove the extra security layer from your account.
data.value: Remove the extra security layer from your account.

data.name: Disabling 2FA does not change the keys used in authenticator apps. If you wish to change the key used in an authenticator app you should
data.value: Disabling 2FA does not change the keys used in authenticator apps. If you wish to change the key used in an authenticator app you should

data.name: 2fa has been disabled. You can reenable 2fa when you setup an authenticator app
data.value: 2fa has been disabled. You can reenable 2fa when you setup an authenticator app

data.name: Set up two-factor authentication with an authenticator app.
data.value: Set up two-factor authentication with an authenticator app.

data.name: To use an authenticator app go through the following steps:
data.value: To use an authenticator app go through the following steps:

data.name: Download a two-factor authenticator app like Microsoft Authenticator for
data.value: Download a two-factor authenticator app like Microsoft Authenticator for

data.name: Scan the QR Code or enter this key into your two factor authenticator app:
data.value: Scan the QR Code or enter this key into your two factor authenticator app:

data.name: Spaces and casing do not matter.
data.value: Spaces and casing do not matter.

data.name: Once you have scanned the QR code or input the key above, your two factor authentication app will provide you with a unique code. Enter the code in the confirmation box below.
data.value: Once you have scanned the QR code or input the key above, your two factor authentication app will provide you with a unique code. Enter the code in the confirmation box below.

data.name: Your authenticator app has been verified.
data.value: Your authenticator app has been verified.

data.name: Create new backup codes for two-factor authentication.
data.value: Create new backup codes for two-factor authentication.

data.name: Generating new recovery codes does not change the keys used in authenticator apps. If you wish to change the key used in an authenticator app you should
data.value: Generating new recovery codes does not change the keys used in authenticator apps. If you wish to change the key used in an authenticator app you should

data.name: You have generated new recovery codes.
data.value: You have generated new recovery codes.

data.name: Download or delete your personal data.
data.value: Download or delete your personal data.

data.name: Your account contains personal data that you have given us. This page allows you to download or delete that data.
data.value: Your account contains personal data that you have given us. This page allows you to download or delete that data.

data.name: Enter a new name for your "{0}" passkey.
data.value: Enter a new name for your "{0}" passkey.

data.name: Give your passkey a recognizable name.
data.value: Give your passkey a recognizable name.

data.name: Error: The specified passkey could not be found.
data.value: Error: The specified passkey could not be found.

data.name: Error: The passkey could not be updated.
data.value: Error: The passkey could not be updated.

data.name: If you reset your authenticator key your authenticator app will not work until you reconfigure it.
data.value: If you reset your authenticator key your authenticator app will not work until you reconfigure it.

data.name: This process disables 2FA until you verify your authenticator app. If you do not complete your authenticator app configuration you may lose access to your account.
data.value: This process disables 2FA until you verify your authenticator app. If you do not complete your authenticator app configuration you may lose access to your account.

data.name: Your authenticator app key has been reset, you will need to configure your authenticator app using the new key.
data.value: Your authenticator app key has been reset, you will need to configure your authenticator app using the new key.

data.name: Validation_FieldLength
data.value: The {0} must be at least {2} and at max {1} characters long.

data.name: Validation_NewPasswordMismatch
data.value: The new password and confirmation password do not match.

data.name: Validation_PasswordMismatch
data.value: The password and confirmation password do not match.

data.name: Validation_PasskeyNameMaxLength
data.value: Passkey names must be no longer than {1} characters.

data.name: Enter a new name for your {0} passkey.
data.value: Enter a new name for your {0} passkey.

data.name: UrlHelperText
data.value: Enter the URL of the learning resource

data.name: NotesHelperText
data.value: Add your notes, learnings, or thoughts

data.name: CouldNotFetchMetadata
data.value: Could not fetch metadata from URL

data.name: DuplicateUrlDetectedMessage
data.value: This URL already exists in your resources. Do you want to add it anyway?

data.name: GroupNameHelperText
data.value: Give your shared collection a name

data.name: GroupDescriptionHelperText
data.value: Describe what this collection is about

data.name: MarketingFooterDescription
data.value: Organize your AI learning journey. Track resources, take notes, and create content.

data.name: Testimonial1Quote
data.value: "Finally, a tool that understands how developers learn. I've saved hundreds of resources and can actually find them when I need them."

data.name: Testimonial2Quote
data.value: "The content ideas feature is a game-changer. I can trace exactly which resources inspired each blog post I write."

data.name: Testimonial3Quote
data.value: "I went from 50+ open tabs to zero. LearnStack keeps everything organized so I can focus on actually learning."

data.name: IAcceptTermsOfService
data.value: I have read and accept the Terms of Service

data.name: FriendsSubtitle
data.value: Connect with other learners and share your learning progress

data.name: NoFriendsDescription
data.value: Invite other LearnStack learners to connect and see each other's public resources

data.name: InviteLinkDescription
data.value: Share this link with another LearnStack user to connect as friends

data.name: InviteExpiry
data.value: This link expires in 7 days and can only be used once

data.name: RemoveFriendConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to remove {0} from your friends?

data.name: YouAreInvitedBy
data.value: {0} has invited you to connect on LearnStack

data.name: InvitationAlreadyUsed
data.value: This invitation has already been used.

data.name: AlreadyFriends
data.value: You are already connected with this person.

data.name: CannotInviteYourself
data.value: You cannot accept your own invitation.

data.name: MakePublicHelperText
data.value: Friends can see this resource and its status

data.name: NoPublicResourcesDescription
data.value: This learner hasn't made any resources public yet.

data.name: MustBeFriendsToViewResources
data.value: You must be friends with this learner to view their public resources.

data.name: OnboardingWelcomeDescription
data.value: Your personal learning hub to save, organize, and track all your learning resources in one place. Let us show you around!

data.name: OnboardingResourcesDescription
data.value: Save articles, videos, courses, and more. Track your progress from "To Learn" to "Completed" and keep your learning organized.

data.name: OnboardingFriendsDescription
data.value: Invite friends to LearnStack, share your public resources, and discover what others are learning.

data.name: OnboardingSharedDescription
data.value: Curate and share themed collections of resources with your friends or the community via a simple link.

data.name: OnboardingContentDescription
data.value: Transform what you learn into blog posts, videos, tutorials, and more. Track your content ideas and link them to your resources.

data.name: OnboardingCompleteDescription
data.value: You're ready to start your learning journey. Add your first resource and begin organizing your knowledge!
